description_long: This stereo sound system features a tall, rectangular column design with a light wood finish and a sturdy square base. The front face displays a black control panel at the top, which includes a digital interface, several buttons, and a small display screen, as well as a speaker grille and a circular speaker opening lower down. A power cord extends from the lower section, indicating its need for an electrical connection. The sides and rear are plain, with the back showing a recessed panel for cable management and another port. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of wood, plastic, and metal components, and the design is both modern and functional for urban environments. The object is intended to stand freely and provide audio output in public or semi-public spaces.
description: A tall, wood-finished stereo sound system with a digital control panel, speaker grille, and power cord, designed for urban environments. The front features interactive controls and a prominent speaker opening.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel, display screen, speaker grille, and power cord.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the column and the circular speaker opening, with the power cord visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a recessed panel for cable management and the power cord connection.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, plain with no visible controls or speaker openings, only the power cord.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, circular logo is visible at the top left of the control panel, featuring a white symbol and text, but the brand name is not fully readable.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille is a black mesh with a fine, regular perforation pattern, circular in shape, and located on the lower front section.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front, featuring a digital display, several round and rectangular buttons arranged in a grid, and labeled sections for different functions.
